class.name: FmodSoundGroup
class.brief_description: A group of sounds for controlling playback limits and collective behavior.
class.description: FmodSoundGroup is used to manage a collection of sounds with shared playback constraints. It allows you to limit the number of simultaneously audible sounds and define behavior when that limit is exceeded. This is particularly useful for managing sound categories like: - Weapon sounds (limit to prevent audio chaos) - Ambient sounds (fade in/out smoothly) - Voice/dialogue (prioritize important lines) When the maximum audible count is reached, the [enum Behavior] setting determines how new playback requests are handled.

method.name: get_max_audible
method.description: Returns the maximum number of sounds in this group that can be audible simultaneously. Returns [code]0[/code] if there is no limit or the sound group is invalid.

method.name: get_max_audible_behavior
method.description: Returns the current behavior when attempting to play more sounds than [member max_audible] allows. See [enum Behavior] for possible values.

method.name: get_mute_fade_speed
method.description: Returns the speed at which sounds fade in/out when being muted/unmuted due to the max audible behavior. Higher values result in faster fades.

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the name of this SoundGroup as specified when it was created. Returns an empty string if the sound group is invalid.

method.name: get_num_playing
method.description: Returns the number of channels currently playing sounds from this SoundGroup. Returns [code]0[/code] if the sound group is invalid.

method.name: get_num_sounds
method.description: Returns the number of sounds that belong to this SoundGroup. Returns [code]0[/code] if the sound group is invalid.

method.name: get_sound
method.description: Returns the [FmodSound] at the specified [param index] in this group. The index ranges from 0 to [method get_num_sounds] - 1. Returns [code]null[/code] if the index is out of bounds.

method.name: get_volume_db
method.description: Returns the volume of this SoundGroup in decibels. Returns [code]0.0[/code] if the sound group is invalid. This volume affects all sounds belonging to the group.

method.name: release
method.description: Releases this SoundGroup and returns all its sounds to the master sound group. After calling this method, the SoundGroup becomes invalid and should not be used. Sounds that were playing continue to play, but are no longer subject to this group's constraints.

method.name: set_max_audible
method.description: Sets the maximum number of sounds in this group that can be audible simultaneously. Set to [code]0[/code] for no limit. When this limit is exceeded, the [member behavior] determines how new sounds are handled.

method.name: set_max_audible_behavior
method.description: Sets the behavior when attempting to play more sounds than [member max_audible] allows. See [enum Behavior] for available options.

method.name: set_mute_fade_speed
method.description: Sets the speed at which sounds fade in/out when being muted/unmuted. Higher values result in faster fades. This affects sounds muted due to [constant BEHAVIOR_MUTE] or being stolen.

method.name: set_volume_db
method.description: Sets the volume of this SoundGroup in decibels. This volume is applied to all sounds belonging to the group. The default value is [code]0.0[/code] dB (unity gain).

method.name: sound_group_is_null
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the SoundGroup handle is null or invalid.

method.name: sound_group_is_valid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the SoundGroup handle is valid.

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops all sounds in this SoundGroup that are currently playing. This stops the channels but does not release the sounds or the group itself.

members.member: The behavior when max audible sounds is exceeded. See [enum Behavior].
Maximum number of simultaneously audible sounds in this group. [code]0[/code] means no limit.
Speed at which sounds fade when being muted/unmuted due to max audible behavior.
Volume of this sound group in decibels, applied to all contained sounds.

constants.constant: When max audible is reached, [method FmodSystem.play_sound] calls fail for new sounds.
When max audible is reached, new sounds start muted and become audible when other sounds stop.
When max audible is reached, the quietest (lowest audibility) sound is stolen for the new sound.
Maximum number of sound group behaviors. Not a valid behavior value.
